what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-80849183
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset
conventions: board:// URI scheme for target reference
concerns: Contains only metadata; no human-readable description or context
Target board item is not resolved within this file
notes: A minimal, timestamped channel attachment that points a board item at a board:// URI into the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or topic does board item-80849183 represent?
Why was this board item attached to dragnet-development?

purpose_vs_actual: The file's metadata structure matches its apparent purpose: recording a typed, timestamped link between a channel and a board item.
apparent_themes: Cross-reference between communication channels and project boards
intention_signals: It appears intended to associate a specific board item with channel activity or memory so the two can be navigated together.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed edge between a channel and a board item, enabling bidirectional lookup without embedding full target content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record of type board_items linking dragnet-development to board://item-80849183 with an added timestamp.
